issue: Difficulty: ❌ EASY - Requires at least HARD for python

agent_report.changes_summary: Fixed instruction sufficiency by documenting evidence.duckdb as authoritative, listing all six table schemas, and naming switch/track vocabulary (north/south, t_sw1_c/t_sw2_d/t_sw3_f/t_sw3_g). Hardened difficulty with interacting precondition gating and exclusive_with clearing semantics in seed_evidence.py, helpers.py, solution/repair_cartridge.py, and three new tests; added BUL-AL to restore the d-seal after exclusive_with so operative goal G stays unique. Bumped Dockerfile to platform-revision 2026-06-30-r18 and updated submission explanations and rubrics.
